series_desc: A monthly gathering for the Black diaspora in Barcelona — building community and momentum ahead of Juneteenth Barcelona 2026 on June 20.
next_event_where: Supper Club · Carrer de Mallorca 41, Barcelona
next_event_desc: Join us on Sunday, April 19 at a home Supper Club to gather, have brunch, drink, and share a nice Sunday together. Come hungry for more than just food! This is your chance to connect, share stories, and raise attention to Juneteenth and the Community Cookout we are planning for June 20, 2026.
ticket1_desc: Wings, chicken & waffle sandwich, plantains, and 2 glasses of champagne.
ticket2_desc: Join us without the brunch. Drinks can be purchased in-person. Food must be pre-ordered via the brunch ticket option.
menu_item1_body: Two glasses of champagne included with your brunch ticket. Cheers.
menu_item2_body: Our signature offering. Fluffy waffles, boneless & skinless fried chicken marinated in a special spice blend and buttermilk brine for 48 hours, fried sweet plantains, a slice of butter, hot sauce and maple syrup.
menu_item3_body: Whole chicken wings marinated in our special spice blend and buttermilk brine for 48 hours. Skin-on and bone-in. Served with hot sauce.
menu_item4_body: The ultimate sweet and hearty comfort food. Ripe plantains fried to perfection.
series_band_sub: BJuneteenth Monthly takes place on the 19th of each month, building up to Juneteenth Barcelona 2026 — our major community cookout on June 20.
